scripts.dev:down: docker compose --env-file packages/config/.env -f docker-compose.dev.yml down --remove-orphans --volumes --rmi local
scripts.prod:up: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; set -a; source packages/config/.env; set +a; GHCR_TOKEN="${GHCR_TOKEN:-${REPO_TOKEN:-${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}}}"; GHCR_USERNAME="${GHCR_USERNAME:-${GITHUB_REPOSITORY_OWNER:-}}"; if [[ "${REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}" == "ghcr.io" && -n "$GHCR_TOKEN" ]]; then [[ -n "$GHCR_USERNAME" ]] || { echo "[ghcr-login] GHCR username missing"; exit 1; }; echo "$GHCR_TOKEN" | docker login ghcr.io -u "$GHCR_USERNAME" --password-stdin; fi; docker compose --env-file packages/config/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --remove-orphans db redis; docker compose --env-file packages/config/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --wait db redis; (docker compose --env-file packages/config/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml stop app_blue app_green mls || true); docker compose --env-file packages/config/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm --no-deps app_blue bun run db:migrate; docker compose --env-file packages/config/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --remove-orphans app_blue app_green mls nginx certbot'
scripts.prod:down: docker compose --env-file packages/config/.env -f docker-compose.prod.yml down --remove-orphans --volumes --rmi local
scripts.prod:local:up: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; set -a; source packages/config/.env; set +a; STACK_NAME="kws"; TARGET_WEB_REPLICAS="${WEB_REPLICAS:-3}"; TARGET_MLS_REPLICAS="${MLS_REPLICAS:-1}"; GHCR_TOKEN="${GHCR_TOKEN:-${REPO_TOKEN:-${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}}}"; GHCR_USERNAME="${GHCR_USERNAME:-${GITHUB_REPOSITORY_OWNER:-}}"; if [[ "${REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}" == "ghcr.io" && -n "$GHCR_TOKEN" ]]; then [[ -n "$GHCR_USERNAME" ]] || { echo "[ghcr-login] GHCR username missing"; exit 1; }; echo "$GHCR_TOKEN" | docker login ghcr.io -u "$GHCR_USERNAME" --password-stdin; fi; if [[ "$(docker info --format {{.Swarm.LocalNodeState}})" != "active" ]]; then docker swarm init; fi; WEB_REPLICAS=0 MLS_REPLICAS=0 docker stack deploy --with-registry-auth -c docker-compose.prod.local.yml "$STACK_NAME"; for service in db redis; do ready=0; for i in {1..60}; do replicas=$(docker service ls --format "{{.Name}} {{.Replicas}}" | grep "^${STACK_NAME}_${service} " | tr -s " " | cut -d" " -f2 || true); if [[ "$replicas" == "1/1" ]]; then ready=1; break; fi; sleep 2; done; [[ "$ready" == "1" ]] || { echo "[prod:local:up] ${service} did not become ready"; exit 1; }; done; docker service scale "${STACK_NAME}_web=${TARGET_WEB_REPLICAS}" "${STACK_NAME}_mls=${TARGET_MLS_REPLICAS}"'
scripts.prod:local:down: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; set -a; source packages/config/.env; set +a; STACK_NAME="kws"; NETWORK_NAME="${STACK_NAME}_default"; if docker stack ls --format {{.Name}} | grep -qx "$STACK_NAME"; then docker stack rm "$STACK_NAME" || true; else echo "[stack] $STACK_NAME is not deployed"; fi; for i in {1..60}; do leftovers=$(docker service ls --format {{.Name}} | grep "^${STACK_NAME}_" || true); [[ -z "$leftovers" ]] && break; while IFS= read -r svc; do [[ -n "$svc" ]] && docker service rm "$svc" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; done <<< "$leftovers"; sleep 1; done; if docker network ls --format {{.Name}} | grep -qx "$NETWORK_NAME"; then docker network rm "$NETWORK_NAME" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi'
scripts.prod:local:ps: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; set -a; source packages/config/.env; set +a; STACK_NAME="kws"; docker stack services "$STACK_NAME"; echo; docker stack ps "$STACK_NAME" --no-trunc'
scripts.prod:local:cleanup: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; for svc in $(docker service ls --format {{.Name}} | grep "^kws_migrate_" || true); do docker service rm "$svc" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; done; echo "[cleanup] done"'
scripts.prod:local:update:web: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; set -a; source packages/config/.env; set +a; STACK_NAME="kws"; IMAGE="${APP_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/jwheeler0424/kyleweberseattle.com:latest}"; GHCR_TOKEN="${GHCR_TOKEN:-${REPO_TOKEN:-${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}}}"; GHCR_USERNAME="${GHCR_USERNAME:-${GITHUB_REPOSITORY_OWNER:-}}"; if [[ "${REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}" == "ghcr.io" && -n "$GHCR_TOKEN" ]]; then [[ -n "$GHCR_USERNAME" ]] || { echo "[ghcr-login] GHCR username missing"; exit 1; }; echo "$GHCR_TOKEN" | docker login ghcr.io -u "$GHCR_USERNAME" --password-stdin; fi; docker pull "$IMAGE" >/dev/null; IMAGE_DIGEST=$(docker image inspect --format "{{index .RepoDigests 0}}" "$IMAGE" 2>/dev/null || true); [[ -n "$IMAGE_DIGEST" ]] && IMAGE="$IMAGE_DIGEST"; docker service update --with-registry-auth --force --image "$IMAGE" "${STACK_NAME}_web"'
scripts.prod:local:update:mls: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; set -a; source packages/config/.env; set +a; STACK_NAME="kws"; IMAGE="${MLS_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/jwheeler0424/kyleweberseattle.com-mls:latest}"; GHCR_TOKEN="${GHCR_TOKEN:-${REPO_TOKEN:-${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}}}"; GHCR_USERNAME="${GHCR_USERNAME:-${GITHUB_REPOSITORY_OWNER:-}}"; if [[ "${REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}" == "ghcr.io" && -n "$GHCR_TOKEN" ]]; then [[ -n "$GHCR_USERNAME" ]] || { echo "[ghcr-login] GHCR username missing"; exit 1; }; echo "$GHCR_TOKEN" | docker login ghcr.io -u "$GHCR_USERNAME" --password-stdin; fi; docker pull "$IMAGE" >/dev/null; IMAGE_DIGEST=$(docker image inspect --format "{{index .RepoDigests 0}}" "$IMAGE" 2>/dev/null || true); [[ -n "$IMAGE_DIGEST" ]] && IMAGE="$IMAGE_DIGEST"; docker service update --with-registry-auth --force --image "$IMAGE" "${STACK_NAME}_mls"'
scripts.prod:local:update:nginx: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; set -a; source packages/config/.env; set +a; STACK_NAME="kws"; IMAGE="${NGINX_IMAGE:-nginx:1.27-alpine}"; docker service update --image "$IMAGE" "${STACK_NAME}_nginx"'
scripts.prod:local:restart:web: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; STACK_NAME="kws"; docker service update --force "${STACK_NAME}_web"'
scripts.prod:local:restart:mls: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; STACK_NAME="kws"; docker service update --force "${STACK_NAME}_mls"'
